name: Idempotent Payment Processing
description: Prevent duplicate transactions from webhook retries using deterministic idempotency keys. Guards against double-crediting users.

input.name: externalEventId
input.description: Unique ID from payment provider (Midtrans transactionId, Stripe paymentIntentId, etc.)

input.name: idempotencyKey
input.description: Deterministic key derived from external event (e.g., 'midtrans_orderId_transactionId')

input.name: payload
input.description: External webhook payload to store for audit

output.name: txId
output.description: Transaction ID (new or cached from existing)

output.name: cached
output.description: True if this was a retry (idempotent return), false if first-time processing

author: Tiranyx
